summary: HoneyGroove v2.7.2 - BLOCK 597 Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend verifications passed: Treasury header with Recovery button visible, RecordDetailPage disclaimer has correct 40px (mb-10) margin-bottom.

issues: Minor React warning: nested <a> tags (Link inside Link for variant tag) - not blocking functionality

backend: GET /api/valuation/recovery/status returns correct structure with status, total, valued, recovered, failed fields
GET /api/valuation/recovery/status includes recovered_details array when recovery completed (if data available)
GET /api/valuation/recovery/status includes total_increase field when recovery completed
POST /api/admin/purge-test-data returns correct response structure (test_users_found, listings_deleted, trade_requests_deleted, notifications_deleted, posts_deleted)
frontend: CollectionPage: Treasury header (data-testid='treasury-header') visible with collection value
CollectionPage: Start Recovery button (data-testid='start-recovery-btn') visible with text 'Recover Values'
CollectionPage: Recovery progress badge component exists (data-testid='recovery-progress-badge')
CollectionPage: Recovery Results Modal components exist (data-testid='recovery-big-win', 'recovery-details-list', 'recovery-modal-close')
CollectionPage: Interactive toast component exists (data-testid='recovery-toast-interactive') - triggers modal on click
RecordDetailPage: Unofficial pill (data-testid='unofficial-pill') visible on Merry Swiftmas record
RecordDetailPage: Disclaimer wrapped in div with 'mb-10' class
RecordDetailPage: Disclaimer wrapper has margin-bottom: 40px (verified via computed styles)
VinylVariantPage: Code review confirms mb-10 class on unofficial-section wrapper (line 204)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (Merry Swiftmas unofficial record)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 597 features verified: 1) Recovery status endpoint (/api/valuation/recovery/status) returns recovered_details array and total_increase when completed. 2) Purge test data endpoint (/api/admin/purge-test-data) works - protects founder account, identifies test accounts by email pattern. 3) RecordDetailPage disclaimer has 40px margin-bottom (mb-10 wrapper div). 4) VinylVariantPage already had mb-10 on unofficial-section. 5) Recovery modal components exist in CollectionPage with proper data-testids. Interactive toast at line 454 triggers modal. Note: Recovery details only populated when actual recovery runs with newly valued records. Previous purge run cleaned 10 test posts - rerunning finds 0.
